title: pkcs11: algorithm() silently falls back to Ed25519 on detection failure
description: secretx-pkcs11/src/lib.rs algorithm() calls detect_algorithm() but swallows the error and returns Ed25519 as a fallback. Trigger: HSM unreachable, permission denied on slot, or session creation fails at algorithm() call time → caller gets Ed25519 regardless of actual key type → subsequent signing produces invalid signatures or verification fails with no diagnostic.
